title: sorbus hostii var. pseudaria
intro: Sorbus hostii var. pseudaria, also known as the Chinese mountain ash, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China, belonging to the Rosaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Sorbus hostii var. pseudaria include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an antiviral agent. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and decoctions, to treat various health conditions, and it can also be used as a tea or tincture for its medicinal properties.
